titleStmt.title: SII 37.227: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 227. (A.R. No. B 331 of 1940-41.) Dēvaguḍi, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Pillar (third) in the mukha-maṇḍapa of the Talakaṇṭamma shrine.
This is dated Śaka 1315, Bhāva, Kārthīka ba. 12, Friday, (expired) corresponding to 1394 A.D., November 21.
It registers the details regarding the enjoyment of the vṛitti land together with their worshipping rights amongst certain Jīyas of the Talakaṇṭidēvi temple.
[Published in Inscription of Andhra Pradesh, Cuddapah District, Part II, Nos. 24 and 25].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sva śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1315 Agunēṁṭi bhāva saṁvvatsara kā¨rti
ka ba 12 śu vubhayanālu gauramānu Ā koḍku rāca
ma na vubhayana taṁmmuḍu vijayanānu jannu
yēkastulainaliṁdaru jiyyala koḍkulu pedabhairu
Ayitajiyyala pinabhairupāpataḷu pe
dataḷu koḍku pāpuja 5 kunnu yiccina
śāsana kramameṭlaṁnnanu taḷakaṁṭṭidēvi
sthānaṁ yaramayāku jelle dinālu 3
llōnu vubha yannapālilōpali dinaṁ
1 kinni krayaṁ rāya jari 135 nūṁ
ṭamuppayi Ayiduṭaṁkkālunu
jelle vritti cēnu rāya jiyyakoḍkunu
lu munnu krayaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā
¨rkkasthāyigānu Istimi yī yē
miveccaṣrayaṁ galiginānu vilu
nesaccuvāṁḍu yī śāsanānku pratirāgi
śāsanālu vēsi vuṁḍḍēvi yī śāsanānku pātu
lu rāmēśvaraṁ sthānāpatulunnu ceṁdama
reḍḍi koḍku daṁḍlūri pōtireḍḍinniyeṟaya
jiyyālunnu mārajiyyala pedda
koḍku bairannavīralu bhayaṁ nmatānu dā
navulapāṭi sthaḷagaraḷaṁ bemmarāju ra

pa nnu yalagayapāsipōṭu
Appuḍu taḷe pāḍluṁnnu malage
gu 1 pāluṁnnu yī kramāna kālakāla
biḍḍala biḍḍala dharaṁ paṁccukuḍucu
ṁvāru .
Digital edition of SII 37.227 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
